person_name: Antiphon of Rhamnus (Antiphon the Sophist, 5th century BCE orator and writer)
person_name_full: Antiphon of Rhamnus (Antiphon the Sophist, 5th century BCE orator and writer)
notes: 5th century BCE orator and writer from Rhamnus, known for works challenging providence and truth.

docs.title: Contra Celsum, Book 4
docs.author: Origen
docs.excerpt: … of deeds proceeding, like his, from a wicked nature; or an Antiphon, who was also considered to be indeed an orator, yet who annihilated the doctrine of providence in his writings, which were entitled Concerning Truth , like that discourse of Celsus, — such individuals are notwithstanding worms,
